plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Adds the caveman speak plugin to reduce token usage and improve response readability

plugins.name: quality-agents
plugins.description: Adds a set of agents to ensure high quality code

plugins.name: research-agents
plugins.description: Adds a set of agents to help with doing research

plugins.name: rules
plugins.description: Manage .claude/rules/ files with proper structure and caveman speak formatting

plugins.name: local-goals
plugins.description: Set + manage session goals in CLAUDE.local.md via /set-goal skill — persistent focus across agents/subagents without repeating yourself

plugins.name: event-sourcing
plugins.description: Event Modeling + Event Sourcing skills — plan systems w/ event models, design streams/aggregates/projections, apply ES patterns

plugins.name: frontend-skills
plugins.description: LLM-safe frontend design-system skills — set up a rigid token + base-component lockdown in Vue projects, and maintain/evolve/port the system anywhere

plugins.name: kb
plugins.description: AI-managed knowledge base wizard — /kb:setup interviews you, then generates a self-sufficient KB repo: rules, garden + scaffold skills, containers, markers, alias registry, dual-job curation w/ subagent delegation

plugins.name: factory
plugins.description: Linear-driven dev workflow — /factory:link repo to project, /factory:search its issues/docs, /factory:ticket files well-formed typed tickets w/ code pointers + images, /factory:work implements tickets solo or in parallel worktree batches w/ tier-matched subagents + draft PRs
